title: General Purpose Attack Fighter
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''General Purpose Attack Fighter''', commonly known as the '''GPA fighter''', was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] developed by the [[Bakura/Legends|Bakurans]].

GPA [[Snubfighter/Legends|snubfighters]] were the core of the starfighter wings of the [[Bakuran Defense Fleet]] in [[18 ABY/Legends|18 ABY]] when the fleet was sent to aid the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] against the [[Sacorrian Triad]] in the [[Corellian Crisis]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Showdown at Centerpoint]]''
